chapter_title.en: Chapter on Advance Payment in Food, Animals, and Other Goods

text: 3952 - وَ- رَوَى الْعَلَاءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ‌ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّهْنِ وَ الْكَفِيلِ فِي بَيْعِ النَّسِيئَةِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3952 - Al-Ala narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim who report from one of Imams (as):
I asked Imam (as) about pledging collateral (Rahn) and having a guarantor (Kafil) in a deferred payment sale.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
